Name: General
Effect: Can't be stacked and can be override

Name: Drought
Effect: Boost flame type attacks (20%) and increase terra defense and special defense (20%)

Name: Storm
Effect: Boost aqua and wind attacks (20%) and slowly heals flora types (1/6HP)

Name: Fallout
Effect: Poisons none toxic and alloy types when they switch in and boost toxic types attacks (30%)

Name: Blizzard
Effect: Boost frost types defense and special defense (10%) and 15% chance to freeze none frost and flame types each turn

Name: Darkness
Effect: Boost soul and monster type attacks (10%) and lowers none monster and soul type's Evasiveness (30%)

Name: General
Effect: Attached to beast and lasts until the ability holder faints. Identical terrains do not stack. Maximum 2 secondary terrains active.

Name: Flower Garden
Effect: Heals all beasts 6% HP each round. Flora types heal 10%.

Name: Shifting Gears
Effect: Turn order reversed (slowest first). Effect occurs every other turn.

Name: Spirit Chain
Effect: Opposing beasts cannot switch unless below 50% HP.

Name: Weather Tower
Effect: Opposing weather effects last only 1 turn.

Name: Dreamscape
Effect: All beasts gain Mind STAB. After using a physical move there is a 25% chance the user falls asleep.

Name: Sticky Sap
Effect: Non‑Flora beasts have Speed reduced by 25%.

Name: Deep Abyss
Effect: Moves ignore evasiveness unless the target is Aqua type. Accuracy cannot fall below 70%.

Name: Mass Madness
Effect: Blocking damage reduction reduced to 30% instead of 60%.
